LRO_fMRILIKING.Description: To what extent did you like or dislike the music?

LRO_fMRIRESONANCE.Description: To what extent was the music experienced by you as in resonance with your subjective experience (i.e. the music was being experienced as 'harmonious' with your emotional state)?

LRO_fMRIOPENNESS.Description: To what extent were you accepting of or open to the music-evoked experience?

imputation_threshold: Max admissible fraction of missing values used for imputation: e.g. 0 = never imputed, 1 = always imputed; 0.5 = only imputed when <= 50% items were missing from the raw data spreadsheet for a given subscale
